# Bug: <title>

## Description
What is the problem.

## Expected Behavior
What should happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens.

## Steps to Reproduce
Step-by-step reproduction.

## Impact
What parts of the system are affected.

## Logs / TraceId
Relevant logs or correlation IDs.

## Fix Scope
What is expected to change.

## Verification
How to verify the bug is fixed.
